name: Credit One Bank Platinum Visa®

earning_rates.notes: 5% cash back at gas stations (on first $10K/year then 1%)
5% cash back at grocery stores (on first $10K/year then 1%)
5% cash back on utilities (on first $10K/year then 1%)
1% cash back on all other purchases

annual_credits.name: Monthly fee offset
annual_credits.description: Annual fee partially offset by rewards in categories

notes: Targeted at credit building. $95 annual fee partially offset by 5% categories. Cap of $10K/year on 5% categories. Reports to all 3 bureaus.
